Title: Retro Abstract Wave Print Pullover Hoodie for Men and Women
Description:
Capture a vintage, nostalgic vibe with this abstract wave print pullover hoodie. Featuring a striking design of layered, colorful waves (pink, light blue, and grey), this hoodie adds a playful pop of color to any casual wardrobe.

Crafted for comfort, it's perfect for running errands, lounging at home, or staying stylish while out with friends. The soft material and relaxed fit make it an ideal go-to piece for year-round wear.

  • Design Focus: Modern geometric abstract wave pattern, inspired by retro surf aesthetics.
  • Comfort & Feel: Made from a soft, breathable blend that feels great against the skin, ensuring maximum comfort all day long.
  • Versatility: Pair it with jeans, shorts, or joggers for an effortlessly cool look.
  • Ideal Gift: A fantastic gift for anyone who appreciates graphic streetwear or retro-inspired apparel.

Sizing & Fit: Unisex sizing provides a relaxed, comfortable fit for all body types.
